opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I dry my face with a towel, this lump on my nose bursts open and bleeds everywhere. Today it just won't stop.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A lump on my nose keeps bleeding when knocked and today it won't stop.

symptom_narrative.onset: a slow-growing spot on the nose over ~2 years; bleeding on and off for 3 months
symptom_narrative.duration: 2 years; today bleeding continuously for ~4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a shiny lump that crusts and bleeds when knocked or towel-dried
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the side of my nose (right nostril area)
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: bleeds after minor trauma; today spontaneous after the crust came off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no real pain or itch with it before today
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: it has slowly grown and crusted over 2 years
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: needs help with daily care; anxious about the bleeding

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a slow-growing lump on the nose for a couple of years

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: aged-care resident, assisted with daily activities

objective_data_offered.value: a ~1 cm shiny/pearly dome-shaped lump on the side of the nose with a little central sore that is slowly oozing; fine surface blood vessels
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate or dermoscopically assess

objective_data_offered.value: slow venous-type ooze soaking gauze; slows with firm pressure
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: on aspirin so oozes more; reported by nursing staff
